Welcome to Ibn Haldun University

13.08.2024

2024 YKS placement results have been announced, now you can call yourself an Ibn Haldun student.

Dear Ibn Haldun University Student,

Thank you for choosing Ibn Haldun University, the only star in its own sky, on the path that will shape your future.

With the board of trustees working to provide the best opportunities for you, academicians who have studied at the best universities of our country and the world, and our administrative staff working overtime to ensure that you have the best experience of being a student at Ibn Haldun, we are here for you and all our students who are the Only Star in Its Own Sky just as you.

Now, in addition to the qualified education and training processes in our undergraduate programs, we are ready for you with rich sociocultural opportunities with clubs and activities, a Student Center designed entirely for you, top quality foreign language programs, and unique university experiences that you will fit into your undergraduate life. Welcome!

You can find everything you need to know about being a student at Ibn Haldun, Turkey's Social Sciences Base, on the "Enrollment Guide" page:

https://oidb.ihu.edu.tr/en/lisans-kayit-rehberi
